causal_chain.mechanism: Unknown biological mechanisms (e.g., antioxidant effects, adenosine receptor antagonism, neuroprotective effects of caffeine and other compounds in coffee)

missing_links: Specific compounds in coffee responsible for the effect
Dosage of coffee required for the effect
Duration of coffee consumption required for the effect
Mechanism by which coffee prevents Alzheimer's at a cellular/molecular level
Whether the effect is preventative or simply delays onset
Whether the effect is consistent across different populations and genetic backgrounds
